result.stdout:
USAGE: gmox [--help] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    serve <options>       Serve command
    version               Displays version

    Use 'gmox <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --help                display this list of options.

commands.payload:
USAGE: gmox [--help] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    serve <options>       Serve command
    version               Displays version

    Use 'gmox <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --help                display this list of options.

result.stdout:
USAGE: gmox serve [--help] [--proto [<string>...]] [--root <string>]
                  [--imports [<string>...]] [--stub-dir <string>]
                  [--work-dir <string>] [--validate-only] [--debug-mode]
                  [--serve-port <int>] [--control-port <int>]

OPTIONS:

    --proto, -p [<string>...]
                          Proto file path(s) to compile.
    --root, -r <string>   Proto root directory (e.g. if operating in a
                          monorepo).
    --imports, -i [<string>...]
                          Additional protos import path(s).
    --stub-dir, -s <string>
                          Directory containing stubs definitions to pre-load.
    --work-dir, -w <string>
                          Overrides the current working directory.
    --validate-only, -v   Makes sure protos compile successfully and terminates.
    --debug-mode, -d      Debug mode.
    --serve-port, -sp <int>
                          gRPC port the mocked service(s) are served at.
                          Default: 4770
    --control-port, -cp <int>
                          HTTP port the control API is served at: Default: 4771
    --help                display this list of options.
